_meta.description: Curated editorial collections. Each collection is a themed product grouping with its own visual identity.

collections.title: Minimalist Tech Essentials
collections.subtitle: Clean lines. Pure function. Apple-level design.
collections.description: Curated tech that looks as good as it performs. Every piece earns its place on your desk.
collections.cover_style: dark gradient with floating product on matte black surface, rim lighting
collections.mood: clean, minimal, premium, monochrome with accent
collections.creative_direction: Apple product page aesthetic. White space. Single product hero. Subtle shadow. Sans-serif typography.
collections.social_hook: Your desk called. It wants an upgrade.

collections.title: Viral TikTok Beauty Finds
collections.subtitle: The products your FYP can't stop talking about.
collections.description: Dermatologist-approved, TikTok-validated. These are the skincare and beauty products actually worth the hype.
collections.cover_style: soft pink/gold gradient, macro product texture, dewy droplets
collections.creative_direction: Luxury skincare commercial feel. Macro texture shots. Soft directional lighting. Dewy surfaces. Cream/gold palette.
collections.social_hook: TikTok made me buy it — and it actually works.

collections.title: Luxury Desk Setup
collections.subtitle: Products that feel Apple-level premium.
collections.description: Transform your workspace into a statement. Every item curated for aesthetics and performance.
collections.cover_style: dark workspace shot, warm accent lighting, bokeh background
collections.creative_direction: Top-down desk flat lay. Warm tungsten accent. Dark wood or concrete surface. Selective focus.
collections.social_hook: Your workspace says everything about you.

collections.title: Premium Gym Gear
collections.subtitle: Train like you mean it.
collections.description: The bottles, shoes, and gear that serious athletes actually use. No fluff, all function.
collections.cover_style: dynamic angle, motion blur background, concrete/gym texture, high contrast
collections.creative_direction: Nike campaign aesthetic. Dynamic angles. Motion freeze. Urban concrete backgrounds. High contrast lighting.
collections.social_hook: Gear that performs as hard as you do.

collections.title: Fashion Essentials Under $200
collections.subtitle: Premium brands. Non-premium prices.
collections.description: Ray-Ban, Nike, Levi's, Michael Kors — the brands that define style, at prices that don't define your bank account.
collections.cover_style: editorial flat lay, marble/concrete surface, natural side lighting
collections.creative_direction: Fashion editorial. Clean background. Dramatic side lighting. Styled product groupings. Magazine layout feel.

collections.title: Smart Home Upgrades
collections.subtitle: Small changes. Big difference.
collections.description: Kitchen tools, bedroom essentials, and home hacks that quietly upgrade your daily life.
collections.cover_style: warm interior scene, scandinavian minimal, soft natural light
collections.creative_direction: Scandinavian interior photography. Warm natural light. Clean surfaces. Lifestyle context (kitchen counter, bedroom).
collections.social_hook: Amazon finds that actually changed my daily routine.

collections.title: Travel Luxury Picks
collections.subtitle: Pack premium. Travel light.
collections.description: Noise-canceling headphones, designer sunglasses, tracking tags — the travel essentials that make every trip first-class.
collections.cover_style: aerial travel flat lay, passport/map props, warm golden hour light
collections.creative_direction: Travel editorial. Flat lay on leather surface. Golden hour lighting. Warm tones. Passport/boarding pass props.

collections.title: Gift Ideas That Actually Impress
collections.subtitle: Stop guessing. Start gifting.
collections.description: Crowd-pleasers with 4.5+ stars and tens of thousands of reviews. These gifts don't get returned.
collections.cover_style: gift box arrangement, ribbon details, soft bokeh, warm studio lighting
collections.creative_direction: Gift guide editorial. Wrapped/boxed products. Warm studio lighting. Festive but not cheesy. Clean typography.
collections.social_hook: Gifts so good they'll think you spent hours searching.

collections.title: Self-Care Essentials
collections.subtitle: You deserve this.
collections.description: The skincare, hydration, and wellness products that turn your bathroom into a spa.
collections.cover_style: bathroom vanity scene, marble surface, soft overhead light, plant accents
collections.creative_direction: Spa/wellness photography. Marble surfaces. Soft diffused lighting. Water droplets. Eucalyptus/plant accents.
collections.social_hook: Your self-care routine is about to level up.
